svg.title: pm-substrate as a product
svg.desc: Three-part architecture: the client's app stays unchanged on the left; a thin integration kit (mapping file, sync adapter, action executor) in the middle; the pm-substrate sidecar with admission gates on the right; agents connect to the substrate through MCP tools. State flows in read-only; only admitted actions flow back to the app's existing API.
svg.text: MCP tools: resume · observe · propose · admit · checkpoint
runs in your VPC or laptop
shadow mode first: warn, don't gate
Grey: state flows in (read-only copy) · Accent: governed paths — agents propose, gates admit, executor applies via your API
